labels.name: performance
labels.description: Payload size, parse and render speed

issues.title: Pipeline divides large offshore wind capacity by 1000
issues.body:
In `scripts/build-data.mjs` (~line 297) the "value >1500 in a small-fuel group must be kW" guard runs **before** wind is split into on/offshore (~line 307), so a legitimate multi-GW offshore farm tagged in MW is silently divided by 1000.

**Fix:** run the guard after the offshore reassignment, or exempt `wind` from it.
*Found in the 22 Jul code review.*

issues.title: Hover-card line swatches use EU voltage thresholds in every country
issues.body:
`src/map/popup.ts` (~line 164) hard-codes `v >= 340` → backbone swatch, `>= 200` → secondary. A US 345 kV line therefore gets the backbone (white) swatch while the legend classes it tier 2.

**Fix:** derive the swatch from the active `country.tiers` instead of fixed numbers.

issues.title: ALL view fails entirely if one country bundle fails to load
issues.body:
`loadAll` in `src/hooks/useGridData.ts` `Promise.all`s eight bundles — a single 404/network failure rejects the whole merged view.

**Fix:** `allSettled`, merge what loaded, and surface a small "X's data failed to load" notice.

issues.title: Live data is cached for the whole session — failures never retried, GB 'now' never refreshes
issues.body:
`src/hooks/useLiveData.ts` caches results (including `null`/`unavailable`) in module-level Maps with no TTL:
- a transient Elexon/snapshot failure marks the country unavailable until reload;
- the GB mix/PN figures are fetched once and go stale during long sessions.

**Fix:** TTL on the caches, retry failures, and refresh the GB mix every ~5 minutes.

issues.title: Clock-change days drop settlement periods 49/50 from GB day series
issues.body: `aggregateDay` in `src/lib/live-core.mjs` only emits 48 half-hour slots; on the autumn clock change GB days have 50 settlement periods, so the last hour of metered data is silently dropped (and the spring day has a hole).

issues.title: Station de-dup misses phase variants — offshore farms double-count
issues.body:
Dedupe in `scripts/build-data.mjs` (~line 326) is OSM id + **exact** normalised name, so "Walney" and "Walney Extension" (umbrella site + phases) both survive — the README's known caveat. Diacritic/punctuation variants also don't merge, and unnamed sites skip name-dedupe entirely.

**Idea:** token-subset match within a small distance radius collapses phases without merging genuinely distinct plants.

issues.title: window.__ukgridMap debug handle leaks after unmount
issues.body: `GridMap.tsx` sets `window.__ukgridMap` on init but the effect cleanup never deletes it, leaving a reference to a removed map instance.

issues.title: Payload diet: US bundle is ~13 MB and parsed on the main thread
issues.body:
`src/data/us/transmission.json` is 9.1 MB + 4.2 MB stations (14,994 sites / 36,710 lines); DE adds 9,711 stations. All are un-tiled GeoJSON parsed with `res.json()` on the main thread — noticeable jank entering US/ALL.

**Steps:** quantise coordinates further, prune sub-100 kV US spurs, parse in a worker. **Longer term:** PMTiles/vector tiles for stations + lines.

issues.title: Tame the Elexon request burst (~30 concurrent) and 16-day metered probe
issues.body:
Per GB page load: 16 parallel day-probes + 13 PN batches + mix (+13 B1610 batches once the day is found). Keyless API → 429 risk for popular deployments, and the probe only needs the newest day.

**Fix:** binary-search (or walk back from yesterday) for the metered day; cap concurrency; reuse probes' responses.

issues.title: Surface the ~1-week B1610 settlement lag in the UI
issues.body: GB per-station day data lags ~8 days (settlement). The hover card shows only the date — users read it as broken rather than lagged. Add a small "metered data settles ~a week behind" hint next to the metered-day date (sidebar + hover cards).

issues.title: Matcher hardening: stricter B20/OTHER fuel compatibility + per-run match report
issues.body: `PSR_COMPAT.B20` / `COMPAT.OTHER` match nearly any fuel and the EU threshold is 0.5, so single-token overlaps can bind the wrong station (co-located or same-town plants). Emit a per-country match report (unit, station, score) from `fetch-entsoe-snapshot.mjs` so bad binds are visible, and consider 0.6+ for B20.

issues.title: Accessibility pass: keyboard access to stations, country-aware labels, reduced motion
issues.body:
From the 22 Jul review:
- Station/line cards are mouse-only — no keyboard or screen-reader path to any data (`GridMap.tsx` handlers).
- `aria-label`s are hard-coded "UK"/"GB" on every country (`GridMap.tsx` map label, `MixStrip.tsx` figure label).
- `fitBounds({duration: 900})` always animates — no `prefers-reduced-motion` handling.
- Header `role="tablist"` has no `aria-controls`/tabpanel; headline `aria-live` re-announces on every filter toggle.

A roving-focus station list (or search-driven focus) would cover the keyboard path.

issues.title: Mobile: sidebar opens covering the map, with no scrim or Escape
issues.body: On phones the sidebar is a fixed overlay and `sidebarOpen` defaults to `true`, so first paint is a covered map; there's no scrim, focus trap, or Escape-to-close. Default it closed under 640 px and add scrim + Escape.

issues.title: Multi-country raw-data fetch: fetch-overpass.mjs is GB-only and the PBF path is undocumented
issues.body:
`scripts/fetch-overpass.mjs` has hard-coded GB queries; every other country was built from manual `pbf-extract-*.py` runs with no npm script or docs, and raw extracts live outside the repo — a clean clone cannot rebuild bundles.

**Fix:** per-country query/extract registry + a documented `npm run data:fetch -- <cc>` path.

issues.title: Pipeline robustness: empty Overpass responses cached as success; corrupt line files silently skipped
issues.body: `fetch-overpass.mjs` `cached()` treats `{elements: []}` as a valid cache hit (bakes empty extracts); `build-data.mjs` wraps line files in try/`continue` so a corrupt file just drops its lines. Both should fail loudly.

issues.title: Regenerate og.png social card for the 8-grid branding
issues.body: `public/og.png` still shows the UK-only art/title. README + meta tags now say GB + EU + US; the card should match.

issues.title: Time slider: scrub the day from series already shipped in snapshots
issues.body: GB snapshots carry 48 half-hourly points per station, EU snapshots 24 hourly — a slider can scrub the whole day client-side with zero new fetching. Bake a per-interval mix array into snapshots so the mix strip scrubs too (today `mix` is a single instant).

issues.title: ENTSO-E intraday: show the latest interval as 'now' instead of a day-average at fake noon
issues.body: `fetch-entsoe-snapshot.mjs` averages A73/A75 into a daily mean with `mix.time` hard-coded to 12:00Z. Fetch the latest published interval and expose it as `nowMW` (like GB's outturn), keeping the daily series for the slider.

issues.title: Station search: type a name, fly to it, pin its card
issues.body: Small search box over the loaded stations (they're all in memory) → `map.flyTo` + pinned popup. Biggest usability win per line of code.

issues.title: US live layer via the EIA hourly API
issues.body: `country.liveKind` already switches live sources; EIA is keyed, so mirror the ENTSO-E baked-snapshot pattern: `liveKind: 'eia'`, a `fetch-eia-snapshot.mjs` + workflow step with an `EIA_TOKEN` secret, snapshots to `public/live/us.json`. Regional (balancing-authority) figures feed the mix strip first; per-plant later if the data supports it.

issues.title: Carbon intensity layer
issues.body: GB: carbonintensity.org.uk is free, keyless and regional — could colour a regional overlay or the mix strip. EU: derivable from the ENTSO-E mix with standard emission factors. Good storytelling layer on top of data we already have.

issues.title: Permalinks: #gb/station/<id> deep links and shareable pinned cards
issues.body: Hash routing already exists for countries; extend it to a pinned station so links open the map zoomed with the card up.

issues.title: History playback from the snapshot archive the workflow already builds
issues.body: `live-snapshots.yml` commits dated snapshots every 6 h — keeping the last N days per country (tiny files) gives a free archive to animate: watch a week of wind fronts cross the North Sea.

issues.title: Demand and price overlays
issues.body: ENTSO-E A65 (load) and A44 (day-ahead prices) documents; Elexon MID for GB prices. Fits the existing snapshot pipeline; render as a strip or per-zone tint.

issues.title: Add Norway (420/300/132 kV) — completes the North Sea picture
issues.body:
Highest-value expansion: NSL and NordLink already exist in the HVDC registry, and the hydro fleet + fjord grid is the best-looking data in Europe.
- Tiers 420/300/132 fit the 3-tier model cleanly.
- One config change now unblocked: widen the `eu` basemap `select` box above 67°N in `scripts/basemap.mjs` so Lofoten/coastal islands ship (mainland already rides the Eurasia polygon).
- ENTSO-E: NO bidding zones (NO1-5) for the live layer.
- Watch basemap size — fjord coastline is heavy at eps 0.004.

issues.title: Add Poland (400/220/110 kV) — the cleanest next grid
issues.body: DE-like classify, no islands, no offshore complexity (one Baltic zone), well inside the eu basemap boxes. Best warm-up for the expansion recipe; ENTSO-E PL domain for live.

issues.title: Add Sweden (400/220/130 kV)
issues.body: Pairs with Norway for the full Nordic view + Baltic links (SwePol, NordBalt, Baltic Cable). Gotland/Öland are already inside the eu select box. Large extent → expect a chunky transmission bundle; ENTSO-E SE1-4.

issues.title: Add Spain — mainland (400/220/132 kV)
issues.body: Iberia rounds out the ALL view's south-west. Scope to the peninsula (like FR): the Balearics/Canaries are separate lower-voltage grids the 3-tier model can't express. ENTSO-E ES domain.

issues.title: Add Italy (380/220 kV; decide the 150 kV strategy)
issues.body: The 150 kV layer is enormous — either omit it (as FR omits 90/63) or ship it with US-style `simplifyEps`/`coordDp` overrides. Sicily/Sardinia are already in the eu basemap. ENTSO-E IT zones are many (IT-North etc.) — mix per zone needs summing.

issues.title: Add Austria + Switzerland (380/220/110 kV), possibly as one combined view
issues.body: Alpine pumped storage is a great story. Landlocked → all the clip work is `isForeignLine` lambdas. Could ship as one combined `CountryId` the way Ireland maps the all-island SEM, or as two entries. ENTSO-E AT + CH domains.
